title: Magically Smoky Korean Doenjang Skewers
description: Salty and juicy Korean doenjang skewers, grilled to perfection on a robata grill and served on an iron teppan, perfect for a show stopping dish, this plant based friendly recipe is a must try
instructions: Preheat the robata grill to medium high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit
Thread the tofu, zucchini, red onion, bell pepper, and mushrooms onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
In a small bowl, whisk together the doenjang, soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic, and sesame oil to make the marinade
Brush the marinade onto the skewers, making sure each piece is fully coated
Place the skewers on the robata grill and cook for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally
Transfer the skewers to the iron teppan and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, serving immediately
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with green onions and sesame seeds if desired
Repeat the cooking process for the remaining skewers
